source.name: PriceCharting completed eBay sales tables
source.method: Editorial medians from the latest up to 10 completed sales visible per condition on PriceCharting game pages.
source.note: Used as a practical proxy for eBay sold listings because direct eBay sold pages are unstable to automate in this environment.
source.selectionRule: Top 20 LEGENDARY/EPIC titles by existing editorial ranking in data/market_candidates.json.
